capabilities_used.evidence: 他最高赞之一直接讨论“$ETH ETF flows chart is wild... Flows have dwindled down to virtually zero”；图 1 也是 ETH ETF flow 拆分图。到 2026-04-11 仍在发“ETF FLOWS: ... BTC: $240M ETH: $64.9M SOL: $11M XRP: $9M”，说明他持续把 ETF 资金流当成行情需求代理变量。

2024-02-23 明确写过：“people tried to call the bottom during the bear market only for price to keep trending lower & lower & lower for months... until no one wanted to even try”，这是典型‘别在瀑布里硬接刀，等市场真正止跌/绝望后再做’。
他反复使用周期框架而非只看单点价格：2024-06-25“a little more summer chop then bull market continuation”，2024-11-05“Bullish for the next 12 months.”，2026-04-11 又用季度统计强化“Q2 averages +24.49%... 2025 had the same setup”。

他频繁把市场定性为区间/震荡：2024-06-25“summer chop”，2026-04-11“Price is still stuck in the same range”，以及“probably chops around all weekend, will assess on Monday how the weekly closed”。这说明他会先判断是否处于盘整 regime，再决定是否追价。

虽然会等确认，但默认偏多：2024-07-29 甚至说“life is too long to be short for even 1 second”；2024-09-17“hold until stalk”；2024-03-31“$SOL making a new USD ATH is the warm up. $SOL making a new BTC ATH is where things get SILLY.”，都是趋势延续而非均值回归语境。

他把当前行情放进跨年度模板里看：2024-09-17“the exact same setup from last year is playing out again: peak apathy = max opportunity”，2024-11-05“summer chop fractal complete. Bullish for the next 12 months.”，是明显的跨周期/分形类比。

他不只看 BTC，还在意何时轮到山寨：2024-03-31 说“$SOL making a new BTC ATH is where things get SILLY”，2024-09-17 强调“altcoins performed in the following 6 months”，2026-04-11 又谈“War for liquidity is heating up next cycle... Base, ETH mainnet, Solana...”。这是典型主流币到山寨轮动视角。
2026-04-11 直接写“BTC is trading below the Bearish Order Block 1 at $76,000–$79,000. If price breaks above this zone...”说明他至少部分吸收了结构派/SMC 的订单块框架。
虽然总体偏多，但他并不否认熊市趋势持续性；2024-02-23 那条关于 bear market “lower & lower & lower for months”的总结，本质上就是承认强下降趋势下任何主观抄底都容易连续失误。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Low-Float High-FDV Reflexivity
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 低流通高 FDV 反身性博弈
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Tracks whether a token launch is structurally fragile or reflexively strong based on float, FDV, unlock profile, and market willingness to ignore valuation during narrative booms.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 根据流通盘、FDV、解锁结构与叙事热度，判断新币是结构性脆弱还是能靠情绪/流动性反身性继续涨。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-05-20 多次讨论“low-float high-FDV launches”，还发了图 3 专门比较 2022-2024 新币 MC/FDV 差距，并写“if everyone is bearish on low-float high-FDV launches...”与“FDV do not matter”式例外判断。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Crypto Political Beta
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses election odds, candidate rhetoric, and regulatory posture as a directional input for crypto sentiment and sector repricing.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把选举胜率、候选人对加密的表态和监管立场，当作加密市场情绪和估值重估的事件驱动因子。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-06-28 说“The next president... may be decided by how much they support our coins”；图 2 也是特朗普/拜登加密立场对照；2024-11-06 转发“THE UNITED STATES WILL BE THE CRYPTO CAPITAL OF THE PLANET...”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Apathy Extreme Opportunity
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treats social disengagement, boredom, and narrative exhaustion as a contrarian accumulation signal when broader cycle conditions remain constructive.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在大周期仍健康的前提下，把社媒冷淡、市场无聊和叙事疲劳视为反向布局信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-09-17 明说“peak apathy = max opportunity”；2024-06-26 也问“Is everyone really full blown doomer at this point?”，这不是传统 TA 指标，而是明显的情绪极值框架。

personal_quirks.quote: people tried to call the bottom during the bear market only for price to keep trending lower & lower & lower for months & months until no one wanted to even try
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不要因为跌很多就主观抄底；趋势没结束前，底部会比你想象得更晚出现。

personal_quirks.quote: Steady lads, a little more summer chop then bull market continuation.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 季节性横盘和磨人行情不改变大级别牛市，只是中继而不是终结。
当市场兴趣与参与度降到极低，往往反而接近高赔率布局区。

personal_quirks.quote: life is too long to be short for even 1 second
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 默认做多偏置极强，除非证据非常充分，否则不愿长期站在空头一边。
在明确牛市阶段，倾向于延长持仓而不是过早止盈。

unique_traits: 他不像纯 K 线 TA 那样只盯图形，而是把 ETF 资金流、政治监管叙事、季节性/周期、以及社交情绪冷暖一起拼成一个偏多的 swing 框架。与很多结构派不同，他的 edge 更像“叙事流动性观察 + 反向情绪判断 + 周期模板”，图表更多是辅助确认而不是唯一决策源。另一个显著特征是他对低流通高 FDV、山寨轮动和‘apathy extreme’这类加密原生结构问题非常敏感。

high_conviction_phrases: life is too long to be short for even 1 second
low_conviction_phrases: Remain optimistic it could turn around
good effort thus far but nothing conclusive yet
